overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player navigating a dystopian urban waterfront beneath a massive concrete overpass. The player moves through a makeshift settlement, descends to a trash-filled canal shore with neon-lit skyscrapers in view, and climbs to an elevated industrial catwalk.

events.description: approaching the edge of the overpass shadow, light increases ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shaded underpass area, passing makeshift stalls and tarps

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing standing near a green tarp structure, facing away from camera

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating roof overhead
tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
large yellow umbrella canopy over a makeshift market stall
small structure covered with green tarpaulin sheeting
wide concrete stairs leading up to the highway level

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dimly lit makeshift settlement beneath a massive concrete overpass. Graffiti covers the walls to the right, while makeshift stalls with tarps and canopies line the path. A person in red stands near a green structure on the left as the player moves toward a brighter opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairs descending to canal level

events.description: beginning descent down concrete stairs toward the water
reaching the bottom of stairs and entering the open waterfront area

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs toward the canal water level, transitioning from covered to open space

entered.detail: murky green water of the urban canal becoming visible
bright orange painted concrete structural wall

segments.scene_description: The player descends a concrete staircase from the overpass shelter down to the canal level. The orange concrete wall dominates the right side while the murky water and distant neon-lit skyline come into view ahead. The lighting shifts from shadowed to bright sunlight as the open waterfront is reached.

scene_state.functional_zone: trash-filled canal shoreline with downtown view

events.description: orbital air building with large neon signage becomes clearly visible across the water
approaching and beginning to climb yellow metal ladder

agents.ego_description: walking along the debris-strewn shoreline, observing the neon skyline across the murky canal

entered.detail: shoreline covered in rubble, plastic bags, and discarded debris
tall skyscraper with prominent green orbital air neon signage
large rusted industrial pipes running parallel to the water
bright yellow metal ladder attached to the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The player explores the open waterfront area at canal level, surrounded by trash and debris. The massive Orbital Air building dominates the skyline across the water with its bright neon signage. Industrial pipes line the left side while the player approaches a yellow ladder on the right leading upward.

events.description: reaching the top of the ladder and stepping onto the metal grate platform

agents.ego_description: climbing the yellow ladder with visible hands, then walking along the elevated industrial catwalk

entered.detail: elevated walkway with metal grating floor and rusted railings
massive cylindrical industrial pipe running along the catwalk
rusted metal scaffolding and support structures

segments.scene_description: The player climbs the yellow ladder to an elevated industrial catwalk, transitioning from ground level to the metal grate platform. Large industrial pipes run alongside the walkway as the player moves forward, with the neon-lit city skyline still visible in the background across the canal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shadowed urban slum beneath a concrete overpass to an elevated industrial vantage point overlooking a neon skyline. It begins by moving through a dimly lit makeshift settlement filled with graffiti and tarp-covered stalls, heading toward a bright opening in the distance. As the camera descends a concrete staircase, the oppressive shadows of the overpass give way to bright sunlight, revealing a murky canal and a distant city skyline. The scene then expands across a debris-strewn waterfront dominated by the massive Orbital Air building and its glowing signage before turning toward a yellow ladder on the right. Finally, the camera climbs the ladder to a metal grate catwalk, transitioning from the ground level to a high industrial platform flanked by large pipes with the neon city still visible in the background.
